data.title: 'The Jay Walker Podcast' Crosses Historic 1 million Download Milestone
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Nashville, Tennessee, Jay Walker, Host and Executive Producer of The Jay Walker Podcast, achieved a significant milestone by surpassing 1 million downloads. This accomplishment solidifies his reputation as a leading figure in contemporary media. The data from Podtrac confirms the historic nature of this achievement, highlighting the immense popularity of The Jay Walker Podcast.

data.title: Over 15 months, BNB holders gained 177% returns through Binance Rewards, averaging 11.8% monthly.
data.description: According to data from Binance, individuals holding Binance Coin (BNB) and taking part in Launchpool initiatives and airdrops experienced a total return of 177% between January 2024 and March 2025. On average, this translates to a monthly return rate of 11.8%.

data.title: Soitec and NSIG to agree extension of licensing framework
data.description: In Bernin, France on March 13, 2026, Soitec, a prominent company in the innovative semiconductor materials sector, has reached an agreement with National Silicon Industry Group Co., Ltd. (NSIG) based in Shanghai. The deal entails a 10-year extension to their current manufacturing and commercial licensing agreement to cater to the increasing demand in China for Soitec SOI products and technologies. The agreement is pending final approval, which includes endorsement by NSIG’s shareholders. The anticipated approval from the shareholders is projected to be secured by March 31, 2026.
Argan makes 2025 universal registration document accessible in English.

data.title: Alaska Air Group to webcast presentation at 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Alaska Air Group Inc. disclosed plans to webcast a fireside chat featuring CEO Ben Minicucci on March [date]. The company, which is the parent entity of Alaska Airlines Inc., Hawaiian Airlines, Inc., and Horizon Air Industries Inc., will broadcast the chat at 10:10 a.m. ET.

data.title: Bitcoin Clears Month-High, This Miner's Chart Outshines Its Peers
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has risen significantly, crossing the $73,000 mark, hitting its highest level since early February. In terms of stock performance, TeraWulf stands out among its peers with a notable improvement in its chart. This surge in Bitcoin price and TeraWulf's strong stock performance were highlighted in an article from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Job Openings May Show AI Jobs Impact; S&P 500 Falls As Inflation Rises
data.description: The number of job openings increased recently, indicating a positive trend, though industry-specific data suggests a potential impact of artificial intelligence on employment opportunities. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 experienced a decline as inflation rates rose.

data.title: Kroger Stock Gets Relative Strength Rating Lift To 82
data.description: Kroger has recently seen a boost in its Relative Strength Rating, which now stands at 82, indicating better technical performance. This news reflects positively on the stock's recent trajectory.

data.title: Bybit Brings Regulators and Global Payment Leaders Together in Georgia to Explore the Future of Crypto Payments
data.description: A forum focused on the future of cryptocurrency was held in Tbilisi, facilitated by Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume. The event gathered regulators, global payment networks, banking executives, and digital asset pioneers. The forum aimed to discuss the evolving landscape of crypto-powered technologies. The event took place on March 13, 2026, in Dubai, UAE.

data.title: Ethereum accumulation wallets surge by 30%, signaling potential price rise for ETH.
data.description: The path to Ether's recovery seems more promising, with Ethereum accumulation wallets and staked supply both increasing steadily. This trend suggests a positive outlook for Ether, with the potential for significant growth in the near future.

data.title: Bitcoin miners were quick to utilize nuclear energy, as AI-driven data center demand boosts nuclear power usage in the US.
data.description: The resurgence in demand for data centers powered by AI technology has led to a renewed interest in nuclear energy across the United States. Bitcoin miners, in particular, have been quick to utilize nuclear power to support their high-performance computing activities. This trend underscores the effectiveness of nuclear energy in meeting the energy-intensive needs of modern technology, with an increasing number of companies looking to leverage its benefits.

data.title: KuCoin introduces perpetual futures for Tesla and Strategy stocks, enabling 24/7 speculation without owning shares.
data.description: Investors can engage in speculation on the price fluctuations of the two companies' shares at any time without actually possessing the underlying stocks using USDt-settled contracts. This offers the opportunity for traders to participate in the market dynamics.

data.title: XRP Up 2% Without ETF Inflows: What Is Going On?
data.description: XRP has seen a 2% increase in value despite experiencing ETF outflows on Thursday. Derivatives volume has spiked by 35% in the last 24 hours. XRP spot ETFs observed $6.08 million in net outflows on March 12, contributing to a total net asset value of $967.77 million. Interestingly, large inflows of $34.73 million were noted on March 6 and 9, offset by outflows on March 5, 10, and 12. U.S.-listed XRP ETFs reported approximately $3.9 million in outflows during the period, indicating that institutional investors may be reducing their positions despite the price upsurge. On the other hand, a surge in trading volume by 35% amounting to $4.45 billion and a 9.37% rise in open interest to $2.66 billion in derivatives indicate significant market activity.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Fades On Inflation, GDP Surprise; Nvidia Turns Lower (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected inflation and GDP data. Adobe stock saw a significant drop due to earnings. The stock market today witnessed the Dow fading due to surprises in inflation and GDP, whereas Nvidia also turned lower. This live coverage highlights the impact of these events on investors.

data.title: Dune Analytics releases CLI and Skills framework for AI agents, providing direct blockchain data access on 130+ chains.
data.description: Dune has released a new CLI and Skills framework that enables AI agents to access blockchain data directly through terminals. This allows AI agents to interact with data from over 130 different chains autonomously, without requiring human intervention.
